tickets.bookQuestion: How do I book tickets online?
tickets.bookAnswer: Booking tickets is easy! Simply browse our shows, select your preferred date and time, choose your seats, and proceed to checkout. You can pay using Chapa, TeleBirr, CBE Birr, or HelloCash.
tickets.getQuestion: How do I get my tickets after booking?
tickets.getAnswer: After successful payment, you'll receive an email with your e-tickets. You can also access them in your account under "My Tickets". Simply show the QR code at the venue entrance.
tickets.limitQuestion: How many tickets can I book?
tickets.limitAnswer: You can book as many tickets as you want! There is no limit on the number of tickets per booking. Feel free to book tickets for large groups and special events.
tickets.transferQuestion: Can I transfer my tickets to someone else?
tickets.transferAnswer: Yes, you can transfer tickets through your account dashboard. Go to "My Tickets", select the ticket, and click "Transfer". The recipient will receive an email with the ticket details.

payments.methodsQuestion: What payment methods do you accept?
payments.methodsAnswer: We accept multiple payment methods including: Chapa (Card/Bank Transfer), TeleBirr, CBE Birr, and HelloCash. All payments are processed securely.

account.createQuestion: How do I create an account?
account.createAnswer: Click "Sign Up" on the homepage, fill in your details, verify your email, and you're ready to start booking! You can also sign up using Google or Facebook.

wallet.walletAnswer: TheaterHUB Wallet is our digital wallet that allows you to store funds for quick and easy ticket purchases. You can add funds using various payment methods.

technical.troubleAnswer: Clear your browser cache, try a different browser, or contact our support team at support@theaterhub.com. We're here to help!
technical.resetPasswordQuestion: How do I reset my password?
technical.resetPasswordAnswer: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the instructions sent to your inbox. You'll be able to create a new password.

documents.requirementsText: Please ensure all documents are clear and legible. Maximum file size: 10MB per file. Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG.

perTicket.description: Pay commission on each ticket sold
perTicket.details: No monthly fees, pay only when you sell

contract.name: Contract Plan
contract.details: Choose monthly, quarterly, or yearly contract

terms.title: Terms & Agreement
terms.subtitle: Please review and accept our terms
terms.intro: By submitting this registration, you agree to the following terms:
clauses: All information provided is accurate and complete
You will comply with all local laws and regulations
Commission rates will apply as per selected pricing plan
For per-ticket model: 5-10% commission on each ticket sold
For contract model: Fixed monthly/quarterly/yearly fee applies
Holdback policy applies for refunds and chargebacks
TheaterHUB reserves the right to verify submitted documents
You are authorized to represent the business
You will maintain accurate show schedules and pricing
You will honor all ticket sales processed through TheaterHUB
terms.adminReview: Important: Your registration will be reviewed by our admin team within 2-3 business days. After verification, you will receive an OTP to complete the registration process.
terms.noRefundNotice: NO REFUND POLICY: The registration fee of $299 is NON-REFUNDABLE under any circumstances, including but not limited to application rejection, withdrawal, or any other reason.
terms.accuracyCheckbox: I confirm that all information provided is accurate and complete
terms.accuracyHint: I understand that providing false information may result in rejection or termination
terms.marketingCheckbox: I agree to receive marketing communications from TheaterHUB
terms.marketingHint: You can unsubscribe at any time
terms.noRefundCheckbox: I understand that the registration fee of $299 is NON-REFUNDABLE
terms.noRefundHint: Payment must be completed before registration submission. No refunds will be issued for any reason.

payment.importantNotice: IMPORTANT: This payment is NON-REFUNDABLE. No refunds will be issued under any circumstances.
payment.secureNotice: 🔒 Secure payment powered by Chapa. Your payment information is encrypted and secure.
